evidence_gaps.description: The Useful Compute Plan is dry-run; tasks are classified but not enqueued and no rewards are active. Tracking this as info, not a defect.
The dossier ran in fallback mode (no ranked targets in the scorecard). The campaign records this as a data-completeness gap, not a scientific claim.
scorecard_features_available is 0; no Geaspirit features were processed for this AOI. Any geological interpretation downstream would be unsupported.

The scorecard's honesty matrix explicitly cites field geophysics (ERT / gravity / magnetics) as what the model cannot see. Without ground-truth geophysical layers the dossier remains a remote-proxy assessment.
No spectral features were processed and the honesty matrix notes spectral / vegetation limits. Mineral templates cannot be scored against this AOI.
No mineral_target hypotheses are present; only AOI-level priority reviews. Rankable targets require feature processing first.
Average council confidence is 0.55 and at least one review is on hold or contradicted. More evidence is required before any promotion.

next_actions.description: After feature processing, regenerate the dossier so it leaves fallback mode and emits mineral_target reviews. Pinned-time flag keeps the SHA reproducible.
next_actions.title: Re-run aoi_to_dossier.py for kalgoorlie once features land

next_actions.description: Run the Geaspirit feature pipeline for AOI 'kalgoorlie' so features_available rises above 0. Until this lands, the dossier will keep running in fallback mode.
next_actions.estimated_cost: hours of operator time + tile downloads
next_actions.title: Process Geaspirit feature layers for the AOI

next_actions.description: Family `aoi_tile_scoring` is classified candidate_reward_worthy in the Useful Compute Plan attached to this campaign. Currently dry-run; not enqueued by Trinity. Future activation requires a separate consensus + governance step the engine does not perform.
next_actions.title: Heavy task family 'AOI feature tile scoring' — when Useful Compute rewards activate

next_actions.description: Family `geology_aware_negative_resampling` is classified candidate_reward_worthy in the Useful Compute Plan attached to this campaign. Currently dry-run; not enqueued by Trinity. Future activation requires a separate consensus + governance step the engine does not perform.
next_actions.title: Heavy task family 'Geology-aware negative resampling for Geaspirit' — when Useful Compute rewards activate

next_actions.description: Family `spectral_template_scoring` is classified candidate_reward_worthy in the Useful Compute Plan attached to this campaign. Currently dry-run; not enqueued by Trinity. Future activation requires a separate consensus + governance step the engine does not perform.
next_actions.title: Heavy task family 'Spectral template scoring' — when Useful Compute rewards activate

next_actions.description: The scorecard cannot replace field geophysics on its own. Operator must source local geophysical datasets and feed them into the Geaspirit feature stack.
next_actions.title: Ingest field geophysical layers (ERT / gravity / magnetics)

next_actions.description: Spectral template scoring is a candidate_reward_worthy Useful Compute family in the plan. Once features are available, the task can be enqueued for cross-worker verification.
next_actions.title: Score Sentinel-2 / EMIT spectral tiles via Useful Compute

next_actions.description: Open every review marked hold or contradicted and decide whether to retire, rewrite, or escalate. Council confidence won't rise on its own.
next_actions.title: Manual operator review of all council hold/contradicted reviews

next_actions.description: Activate Useful Compute rewards for any family. The engine never does this; rewards activation requires a separate consensus / governance procedure.
next_actions.forbidden_reason: matched forbidden substring: 'activate useful compute reward'
next_actions.title: Activate Useful Compute rewards

next_actions.description: Modify consensus, miner, node, or RPC schema. The engine is strictly out of those layers.
next_actions.title: Modify consensus / miner / node / RPC

next_actions.description: Move funds. The engine touches no wallet, no key, no transaction broadcast path.
next_actions.title: Move funds from the wallet

next_actions.description: Publish reward-bearing tasks to the public Useful Compute API. The engine never publishes; the worker remains untouched.
next_actions.title: Publish reward-bearing tasks to the public Useful Compute API

next_actions.description: Auto-register hash on chain. The engine produces a ready-to-register proof bundle; broadcasting the capsule is an operator-driven step outside this module.
next_actions.forbidden_reason: matched forbidden substring: 'register hash on chain'
next_actions.title: Register hash on chain automatically

objectives.description: Bind the two existing reproducible artefacts to one campaign manifest with a single SHA-256 the operator can later register on chain.
objectives.title: Anchor dossier and Useful Compute Plan in a single proof bundle

objectives.description: Detect every recognised deficiency in the dossier and the plan; map each to a concrete next action with bucket / impact / safety classification.
objectives.title: Surface and rank evidence gaps for this AOI

objectives.description: Hard veto via forbidden-substring routing. Such actions land in the unsafe_or_forbidden bucket with the matched substring recorded as the reason.
objectives.title: Refuse any action that activates rewards / publishes tasks / touches consensus
